01-01.question: It's One Piece creator Eiichiro Oda's birthday (and New Year's). What's the name of the legendary treasure the entire series is about?
01-01.hint2: Left behind by the Pirate King, Gol D. Roger.
01-01.funFact: Happy birthday Oda, and happy New Year! Shoutout to the One Piece heads in this kitchen — Zach, Alex, and Grant. 🏴‍☠️

02-04.question: On this day in 2018 the Eagles won their first Super Bowl. What's the trick play — where backup QB Nick Foles CAUGHT a touchdown — forever known as?
02-04.hint2: Foles caught it, he didn't throw it.
02-04.funFact: Fly Eagles Fly. 🦅 The whole kitchen still gets chills. (Super Bowl LII, Foles over Brady.)

02-14.question: Valentine's Day moves a mountain of chocolate. What compound in chocolate is actually toxic to dogs?
02-14.hint2: Dogs break it down very slowly.
02-14.funFact: Keep the fudge away from the pups. 🐶🍫 Happy Valentine's from Big Sam.

03-16.question: Happy birthday to Sixers MVP big man Joel Embiid. Complete the Sixers-era motto he embraced: 'Trust the ___.'
03-16.funFact: Shoutout to the certified Joel glazers in the kitchen — Alex, Gabe, and Aidan. 🐐 Trust the Process.

05-05.question: It's Monkey D. Luffy's birthday. What Devil Fruit gave him a body that stretches like rubber?
05-05.answer: The Gum-Gum Fruit (Gomu Gomu no Mi)
05-05.hint1: It's named after a stretchy material.
05-05.funFact: Happy birthday Luffy! The One Piece crew — Zach, Alex, Grant — are eating good today. 🍖🏴‍☠️

05-09.question: May 9 is officially 'Goku Day' in Japan. In Dragon Ball, what planet is Goku originally from?
05-09.hint2: Same name as a certain prince.
05-09.funFact: Kamehameha! 🐉 The Saiyans were named after vegetables (Kakarot = carrot).

05-19.question: The Flyers won their first Stanley Cup in 1974 — the first expansion team ever to do it. By what bruising nickname was that team known?
05-19.funFact: Still the only Cups in Flyers history (1974 and 1975). 🟠 Let's go Flyers.

06-07.question: Happy birthday to Sixers icon Allen Iverson. In his most famous press conference rant, what one word did AI keep repeating — not the game, but ___?
06-07.hint1: Something you do before the game.
06-07.funFact: 'We talkin' bout PRACTICE.' A Philly legend forever. 🏀

06-19.question: Juneteenth marks the day in 1865 that enslaved people in Texas finally learned they were free — over two years after the Emancipation Proclamation. Which Texas city is it tied to?
06-19.funFact: Juneteenth became an official U.S. federal holiday in 2021.

07-04.question: Two Founding Fathers — both U.S. presidents — died on the same July 4th in 1826, exactly 50 years after independence. Name one of them.
07-04.hint2: One wrote the Declaration; the other was the 2nd president.
07-04.funFact: Adams' reported last words were 'Thomas Jefferson survives' — but Jefferson had actually died hours earlier. 🎆

07-22.question: One Piece — the best-selling manga of all time — debuted on this day in 1997. What's the name of Luffy's pirate crew?
07-22.funFact: Best-selling manga in history. The kitchen One Piece heads (Zach, Alex, Grant) approve. 🏴‍☠️

08-07.question: Happy birthday to Eagles QB Jalen Hurts. He was named MVP of which Super Bowl, leading the Eagles past the Chiefs?
08-07.hint2: A rematch with Kansas City — and revenge.
08-07.funFact: P.S. — Alex would leave this kitchen forever to be Jalen Hurts' #1 guy. Wedding bells and all. 👀💍 (he's wallin, he swears he's not.)

08-23.question: Happy birthday to Kobe Bryant, who grew up right outside Philly. What suburban Philadelphia high school did Kobe lead to a state championship?
08-23.funFact: Mamba mentality — born and raised near Philly. 🐍 Aug 24 is 'Mamba Day' (8/24 for jerseys #8 and #24).

08-29.question: Happy birthday to the King of Pop, Michael Jackson. His 1982 record is the best-selling album of all time — name it.
08-29.hint1: Also a famous zombie music video.
08-29.funFact: 'Thriller' has sold over 60 million copies. 🕺 The moonwalk debuted on TV the next year.

09-21.question: Earth, Wind & Fire ask 'Do you remember' the dancing on which exact night, in their song 'September'?
09-21.hint1: It's a date in the song.
09-21.funFact: Today's the day the internet celebrates every year. Ba-dee-ya! 🎶

10-10.question: It's Naruto Uzumaki's birthday. What's the name of the Nine-Tailed Fox sealed inside him?
10-10.funFact: Believe it! 🍥 Naruto's birthday (Oct 10) lines up with the start of his story.

10-20.question: The One Piece anime first aired on this day in 1999. In one word (or phrase), what is Luffy's lifelong dream?
10-20.funFact: 25+ years and still sailing. 🏴‍☠️ Zach, Alex, and Grant are losing it today.

10-29.question: On this day in 2008 the Phillies won the World Series. Which closer struck out the final batter to clinch it?
10-29.hint1: He was the Phillies' closer that year.
10-29.hint2: He didn't blow a single save all season.
10-29.funFact: Lidge went a perfect 48-for-48 in saves in 2008. Ring the bell. 🔔

10-31.question: Halloween moves a mountain of candy. What's the top-selling Halloween candy in the U.S. most years — fitting for a fudge shop?
10-31.hint2: It's a James' Fudge flavor too.
10-31.funFact: On theme for the kitchen. 🎃 Happy Halloween from Big Sam.

12-25.question: A gift fit for royalty: which red-threaded spice, hand-picked from a crocus flower, costs more than gold by weight?
12-25.hint2: Each flower gives only a few.
12-25.funFact: Merry Christmas from Big Sam and the whole kitchen. 🎄
